_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: CodeReview Templates — Anchor Reviewers to Design Doc Before Code Inspection

steps.description: Add new '## Read the Design Document FIRST' section before the lint/format gate in CodeReview_Prompt_Template.md and CodeReview_Final_Prompt_Template.md; augment existing review-checklist items with explicit design-doc TDD anchoring; run iw sync-templates to propagate to per-project ai-dev/templates/ mirrors

Code review of S01 (template edits + sync output): verify new section is prominent, imperative, placed correctly; verify banner sections preserved verbatim; verify per-project mirrors are byte-identical to masters
Final cross-step review: consistency of new section between the two CodeReview templates; AC1–AC5 trace; no regression in adjacent prompt-template files
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
